ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "uom_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UoM lead for the project */,
  "toronto_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Toronto lead for the project */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty at UoM associated with the project */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school at UoM associated with the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the project */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses incurred on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_uom_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("uom_lead_id") REFERENCES uom_leads ("uom_lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_toronto_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("toronto_lead_id") REFERENCES toronto_leads ("toronto_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uom_leads" (
  "uom_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UoM lead */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the UoM lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the UoM lead */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty at UoM associated with the UoM lead */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school at UoM associated with the UoM lead */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the UoM lead */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the faculty associated with the UoM lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uom_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toronto_leads" (
  "toronto_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Toronto lead */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Toronto lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the Toronto lead */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the Toronto lead */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the university associated with the Toronto lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toronto_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean of the faculty */,
  "dean_name" TEXT /* Name of the dean of the faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty associated with the school */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the school */,
  "head_name" TEXT /* Name of the head of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., proposal, report, publication) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is associated with */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., researcher, project manager) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the team member's involvement in the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the team member's involvement in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the university associated with the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the funding is associated with */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., grant, award, sponsorship) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the funding */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, approved, expired) */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the expense is associated with */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., travel, equipment) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the expense */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the budget is associated with */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget (e.g., personnel, equipment) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who allocated the budget */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_allocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, project manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
